summary: The stock market experienced significant growth this quarter, driven by strong performance in the technology sector. Analysts predict that the global economy will continue to expand, with increased opportunities in banking and finance industries.

The stock market experienced significant growth this quarter, driven by strong performance in the technology sector. Analysts predict that the global economy will continue to expand, with increased opportunities in banking and finance industries.

SENTIMENTAL ANALYSIS OF TWEETS Sentiment Analysis is an important application of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning that focuses on understanding human emotions and opinions from textual data. Various Machine Learning and Deep Learning models , including Naïve Bayes, Support Vector Machines (SVM), and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks, are trained and evaluated for sentiment classification.

SENTIMENTAL ANALYSIS OF TWEETS Sentiment Analysis is an important application of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning that focuses on understanding human emotions and opinions from textual data. Various Machine Learning and Deep Learning models , including Naïve Bayes, Support Vector Machines (SVM), and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks, are trained and evaluated for sentiment classification.
